name: temporal-architect
description: Design, validate, and implement entire Temporal systems: a `.twf` architecture toolchain with design, Go-authoring, and infra-provisioning skills, plus the twf MCP server. Plugin payload ships from npm; this directory exists only because Claude Code reads marketplace.json from this fixed path.
